description: Google Cloud Secret Manager stores and manages sensitive values such as API keys, passwords, certificates, and other secrets. It is a managed Google Cloud service for creating, versioning, and accessing secrets with IAM-based access control.
summary: Secret Manager on secretmanager.googleapis.com exposes a REST API at `https://secretmanager.googleapis.com/v1` and is also operated via the `gcloud secrets` CLI; both use Google Cloud authentication with OAuth 2.0/ADC-backed access tokens.

surfaces.name: Google Cloud Secret Manager REST API
